race.description: Hec Freeman & Bill Faulker Maiden Hcp
race.comment: WHAT DID YOU SAY (9) just missed over 1200m at Kilcoy and then led early over 1540m on the Gold Coast Poly but didn't finish it off. Finds a suitable assignment and racing forward, he will get every chance. CROKER (5) resumed at the Gold Coast and needed the outing. His effort there three back on debut stacks up for this, and quick improvement is on the cards. Tougher sorting the remainder. TURF GAZETTE (4) drops back to a sprint and presents fourth up. Has an awkward gate but is likely to race better. SAMPHIRE GREEN (8) will be fitter and will find this easier than Doomben. His effort at Moree three back would have him around the mark.
